LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.0.descrip: Cover the engine with extended armor plating, protecting it from gunfire.
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.0.label: Engine Cover
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.1.descrip: Weld a layer of reinforced steel plating to the vehicle, increasing its armor value at the cost of increasing vehicle mass and lowering acceleration.
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.1.label: Reinforced Armor
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.10.descri: Improve the exhaust system of the vehicle, improving fuel efficiency slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.10.label: Fuel Consumption
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.11.descri: Increase the size of the chemtank slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.11.label: Fuel Capacity
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.2.descrip: Extend the cabin by adding space for an additional gunner, with all the required apparatus.
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.2.label: Gunner Seat
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.3.descrip: Improve the armor of the treads by covering them in thick steel plating.
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.3.label: Armored Treads
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.4.descrip: Increase the length of the tank barrel, allowing for more precise shots over significantly longer distance, but decreasing the rotation speed of the cannon.
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.4.label: Long Barrel
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.5.descrip: Decrease the length of the tank barrel, allowing for more rapid shots at the cost of precision and range. The reduced weight of the turret allows for faster rotation speed.
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.5.label: Short Barrel
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.6.descrip: Improve the cargo capacity of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.6.label: Cargo Capacity
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.7.descrip: Reinforce the armor of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.7.label: Armor
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.8.descrip: Improve the engine of the vehicle, allowing it to reach higher maximum speed.
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.8.label: Speed
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.9.descrip: Improve shifting capabilities of transmission to increase acceleration speed of the vehicle slightly.
LanguageData.VVE_Roadkill_UpgradeTree.nodes.9.label: Acceleration
